About me

So!

My name is Vlad. I am rendering engineer from Estonia. I started my career path as a game developer in Unity, then Unreal Engine and here I am, working on the proprietary game engine (can’t tell, NDA) AND my own one. I have wide expertise in gamedev pipeline (starting from game design, 3D modeling, sound desing, ending with tech research, market research, analytics and many more) and also deep knowledge in rendering and related.

Beside that I’m interested in other stuff as well.

I do:

  • 🌍 WorldBuilding
  • 🎮 GameDev
  • 🧪 Researching
  • ➗ Math
  • 🎵 Music
